heroHeadline: SEC Insider Trades. Seconds, Not Days.
heroSubheadline: Every Form 4 filing across 17,325+ public companies — parsed, scored for conviction, and delivered to your inbox in under 60 seconds.
heroTrustLine: All data sourced directly from SEC EDGAR.
alertFeedSubline: Insider transactions filed with the SEC today. Parsed and scored in real time.

howItWorksSteps.title: Monitor
howItWorksSteps.desc: 17,325+ public companies. Every Form 3, Form 4, and Schedule 13D filed with the SEC. Continuous monitoring, no gaps.

howItWorksSteps.title: Analyze
howItWorksSteps.desc: 80% of insider filings are routine compensation or pre-scheduled 10b5-1 plans. Our scoring model isolates the 20% that signal genuine conviction — and tells you why.

howItWorksSteps.title: Deliver
howItWorksSteps.desc: Filing to inbox: under 60 seconds. The average retail investor sees the same data 24-48 hours later. 25% of abnormal returns from insider purchases accrue within 5 trading days.

statsHeader: The Academic Case for Insider Signal Intelligence

stats.label: Annual Outperformance
stats.desc: Corporate insider purchase portfolios outperformed the market by 10.2% per year over the study period.

stats.label: Returns in First 5 Days
stats.desc: One quarter of abnormal returns following insider purchases accrue within the first 5 trading days of the filing. Speed of delivery is not a feature — it is the thesis.

stats.label: Predictive of 1-Year Returns
stats.desc: Aggregate insider trading activity predicts up to 60% of variation in one-year-ahead market returns.
stats.source: Source: Seyhun, Journal of Law and Economics, 1992

reportsSubheadline: Single-stock deep dives, sector analysis, and dividend safety reports. SEC insider data cross-referenced with fundamentals. Each report includes an explicit verdict.
pricingSubheadline: All plans include the SEC EDGAR real-time feed. Billed annually.
pricingLossFraming: Last week: 847 Form 4 filings. 23 triggered high-conviction alerts. Free users received the digest on Monday.
ctaHeadline: 142 Form 4 Filings Today. Your Pipeline: Empty.
ctaSubheadline: Set up your watchlist in 60 seconds. The next filing that matters to your portfolio will arrive before you finish reading this sentence.
